title: Cobblemon: PC on a Stick
description: You've heard of Crafting table on a stick? Here is PC on a stick! Now your Cobblemon PC can be easily portable!
body:
# Cobblemon: PC on a Stick
Built using the [Crafting on a Stick](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafting-on-a-stick) API, this mod is a super simple addon mod for Crafting on a Stick and Cobblemon to bring your PC with you on a Stick! ## Requirements - NeoForge (Crafting on a Stick only has NeoForge versions) - [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) - [Matthiesen Lib API](https://modrinth.com/mod/matthiesen-lib-api) - [Matthiesen Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/matthiesen-lib) - [Crafting on a Stick](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafting-on-a-stick) ## Docs Documentation for this mod can be found at [mods.matthiesen.dev](https://mods.matthiesen.dev/cobblemon-pc-on-a-stick/) ## Version Compatibility | Minecraft Version | Mod Version | |-------------------|-------------| | 1.21.1 | 1.x.x | ## License MIT - see `LICENSE`.
